mapper.insert: INSERT INTO talk_msg(sender_username, receiver_username, content, timestamp) VALUES (#{senderUsername},#{receiverUsername},#{content},#{timestamp})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM talk_msg WHERE (receiver_username = #{getMan} AND sender_username = #{sendMan}) OR (receiver_username = #{sendMan} AND sender_username = #{getMan})
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM talk_msg WHERE (receiver_username = #{getMan} AND sender_username = #{sendMan} AND is_read = 0)
mapper.update: update talk_msg set is_read = 1 where sender_username=#{sendMan} and receiver_username=#{getMan}
